texto: When you're younger you're so happy to get some good loving you convince yourself you're in love, can't live with out it, and chase the dick like a crack addict after the pipe, or chase the bad sex hoping something happened to the man over night and the next time it'll be good.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jill Nelson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “When you're younger you're so happy to get some good loving you convince yourself you're in love,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que felicidade, females, novel pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: When you're younger you're so happy to get some good loving you convince yourself you're in love, can't live with out it, and chase the dick like a crack addict after the pipe, or chase the bad sex hoping something happened to the man over night and the next time it'll be good.
